inputs.name: fileEncoding
inputs.description: Optional. The encoding of the template file. If fileEncoding is not specified, the default file encoding specified in the watt.server.netEncoding server parameter or the system file encoding will be used. Examples: SJIS, ASCII, ISO8859_1.

outputs.name: $txt
outputs.description: Results from applying $template to the pipeline.
